---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to Bids
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What's the friction or gap? Who hits it, and when? (e.g. "When hiring an agent I can't…")

## Proposal

What you'd like to see. If it touches the core loop — discover → hire → verify → pay →
reputation — say where it fits.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why this one wins.

## Notes

Mockups, links, or prior art that help make the case.
